payload.label: table lamp
payload.long_description: Beige pleated fabric bell-shaped shade with dark vertical trim sits above a carved dark-brown turned base on a square stepped plinth; lamp is illuminated, mostly visible but the right side of the shade is slightly edge-cropped, approximately 0.7 m from the camera.
